original: Against a backdrop of drastic changes in economy and population structure, younger Americans are drawing a new 21st-century road map to success, a latest poll has found.
translation_literal: 在经济和人口结构发生剧烈变化的背景下，一项最新民调发现，年轻美国人正在绘制一幅新的 21 世纪成功路线图。

chunks.english: Against a backdrop of drastic changes in economy and population structure
chunks.chinese: 在经济和人口结构发生剧烈变化的背景下

chunks.english: a new 21st-century road map to success
chunks.chinese: 一幅新的 21 世纪成功路线图

chunks.english: of drastic changes in economy and population structure
chunks.chinese: 经济和人口结构剧烈变化的

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 主句 + 句末来源说明
sentence_patterns.explanation: a latest poll has found 放在句末，说明前面结论来源。

original: Across generational lines, Americans continue to prize many of the same traditional milestones of a successful life, including getting married, having children, owning a home, and retiring in their sixties.
translation_literal: 跨越代际界限，美国人继续珍视成功人生中许多相同的传统里程碑，包括结婚、生子、拥有住房以及在六十多岁退休。

chunks.english: many of the same traditional milestones of a successful life
chunks.chinese: 成功人生中许多相同的传统里程碑

chunks.english: including getting married, having children, owning a home, and retiring in their sixties
chunks.chinese: 包括结婚、生子、拥有住房以及在六十多岁退休
chunks.relation: 列举 traditional milestones 的内容

chunks.english: getting married / having children / owning a home / retiring in their sixties
chunks.chinese: 结婚 / 生子 / 拥有住房 / 在六十多岁退休
chunks.relation: 四个传统人生里程碑并列

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: including A, B, C, and D
sentence_patterns.explanation: including 后四个动名词结构并列，都是 milestones 的例子。

original: But while young and old mostly agree on what constitutes the finish line of a fulfilling life, they offer strikingly different paths for reaching it.
translation_literal: 但是，尽管年轻人和老年人大体同意什么构成充实人生的终点，他们却提供了到达这一终点的截然不同的路径。

chunks.english: while young and old mostly agree on what constitutes the finish line of a fulfilling life
chunks.chinese: 尽管年轻人和老年人大体同意什么构成充实人生的终点
chunks.relation: 说明主句成立的让步背景

chunks.english: what constitutes the finish line of a fulfilling life
chunks.chinese: 什么构成充实人生的终点
chunks.relation: 作 agree on 的宾语

chunks.english: strikingly different paths for reaching it
chunks.chinese: 到达这一终点的截然不同的路径

sentence_patterns.explanation: while 在这里不是时间“当……时”，而是“尽管”，引出让步背景。

original: Young people who are still getting started in life were more likely than older adults to prioritize personal fulfillment in their work, to believe they will advance their careers most by regularly changing jobs, to favor communities with more public services and a faster pace of life, to agree that couples should be financially secure before getting married or having children, and to maintain that children are best served by two parents working outside the home, the survey found.
translation_literal: 调查发现，仍处在人生起步阶段的年轻人比年长成年人更可能优先考虑工作中的个人成就感，认为他们通过定期换工作最能推进职业发展，偏爱有更多公共服务和更快生活节奏的社区，认同夫妻应在结婚或生子前经济稳定，并坚持认为有两个在外工作的父母最有利于孩子。

chunks.english: Young people who are still getting started in life
chunks.chinese: 仍处在人生起步阶段的年轻人

chunks.english: who are still getting started in life
chunks.chinese: 仍处在人生起步阶段的

chunks.relation: who 定语从句内部主语
who 定语从句内部谓语
说明 more likely 的比较对象

chunks.english: to prioritize personal fulfillment in their work
chunks.chinese: 优先考虑工作中的个人成就感

chunks.english: to believe they will advance their careers most by regularly changing jobs
chunks.chinese: 认为他们通过定期换工作最能推进职业发展

chunks.english: they will advance their careers most by regularly changing jobs
chunks.chinese: 他们通过定期换工作最能推进职业发展

chunks.english: to favor communities with more public services and a faster pace of life
chunks.chinese: 偏爱有更多公共服务和更快生活节奏的社区

chunks.english: to agree that couples should be financially secure before getting married or having children
chunks.chinese: 认同夫妻应在结婚或生子前经济稳定

chunks.english: that couples should be financially secure before getting married or having children
chunks.chinese: 夫妻应在结婚或生子前经济稳定

chunks.english: to maintain that children are best served by two parents working outside the home
chunks.chinese: 坚持认为有两个在外工作的父母最有利于孩子

chunks.english: that children are best served by two parents working outside the home
chunks.chinese: 有两个在外工作的父母最有利于孩子

chunks.relation: believe 后宾语从句内部主语
believe 后宾语从句内部谓语
作 will advance 的宾语
agree 后宾语从句内部主语
agree 后宾语从句内部谓语
作 should be 的表语
maintain 后宾语从句内部主语
maintain 后宾语从句内部谓语

chunks.english: by two parents working outside the home
chunks.chinese: 由两个在外工作的父母
chunks.relation: 说明 are served 的施动者

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: were more likely to A, to B, to C, to D, and to E
sentence_patterns.explanation: more likely 后接五个并列不定式，是本句的主要难点。

original: From career to community and family, these contrasts suggest that in the aftermath of the searing Great Recession, those just starting out in life are defining priorities and expectations that will increasingly spread through virtually all aspects of American life, from consumer preferences to housing patterns to politics.
translation_literal: 从职业到社区和家庭，这些差异表明，在严重的大衰退之后，那些刚刚开始人生的人正在定义优先事项和期望，而这些优先事项和期望将越来越扩展到美国生活几乎所有方面，从消费者偏好到住房模式再到政治。

chunks.english: From career to community and family

that in the aftermath of the searing Great Recession, those just starting out in life are defining priorities and expectations that will increasingly spread through virtually all aspects of American life, from consumer preferences to housing patterns to politics
chunks.chinese: 在严重的大衰退之后，那些刚刚开始人生的人正在定义优先事项和期望，而这些将越来越扩展到美国生活几乎所有方面

chunks.english: in the aftermath of the searing Great Recession
chunks.relation: 说明 are defining 的背景

chunks.english: those just starting out in life
chunks.chinese: 那些刚刚开始人生的人

chunks.relation: 作 are defining 的宾语

chunks.english: that will increasingly spread through virtually all aspects of American life
chunks.chinese: 将越来越扩展到美国生活几乎所有方面的

chunks.relation: that 定语从句内部主语
that 定语从句内部谓语

chunks.english: through virtually all aspects of American life
chunks.chinese: 遍及美国生活几乎所有方面

chunks.english: from consumer preferences to housing patterns to politics
chunks.chinese: 从消费者偏好到住房模式再到政治

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.pattern_form: suggest that + 状语 + 主语 + 谓语 + 定语从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: that 从句内部先插入长状语，宾语 priorities and expectations 后又接定语从句。

original: Young and old converge on one key point: Overwhelming majorities of both groups said they believe it is harder for young people today to get started in life than it was for earlier generations.
translation_literal: 年轻人和老年人在一个关键点上趋同：两组中的压倒性多数都说，他们认为今天的年轻人开始人生比早先几代人更难。

chunks.relation: 作 converge on 的宾语

chunks.english: Overwhelming majorities of both groups said they believe it is harder for young people today to get started in life than it was for earlier generations
chunks.chinese: 两组中的压倒性多数都说，他们认为今天的年轻人开始人生比早先几代人更难
chunks.relation: 冒号后解释 one key point 的内容

chunks.english: they believe it is harder for young people today to get started in life than it was for earlier generations
chunks.chinese: 他们认为今天的年轻人开始人生比早先几代人更难

chunks.relation: believe 后小从句的形式主语

chunks.chinese: 对今天的年轻人来说更难

chunks.relation: 真正主语，对应形式主语 it

chunks.english: than it was for earlier generations

sentence_patterns.explanation: 冒号后的整句解释 one key point。

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: it is + adj. + for sb. + to do
sentence_patterns.explanation: it 是形式主语，真正主语是 to get started in life。

original: While younger people are somewhat more optimistic than their elders about the prospects for those starting out today, big majorities in both groups believe those “just getting started in life” face a tougher good-paying job, starting a family, managing debt, and finding affordable housing.
translation_literal: 尽管年轻人对于今天起步者的前景比他们的长辈略微更乐观，两组中的大多数人都认为那些“刚开始人生”的人面临更困难的局面，包括找到高薪工作、组建家庭、管理债务以及找到负担得起的住房。

chunks.english: While younger people are somewhat more optimistic than their elders about the prospects for those starting out today
chunks.chinese: 尽管年轻人对于今天起步者的前景比他们的长辈略微更乐观
chunks.relation: 说明主句观点的让步背景

chunks.english: somewhat more optimistic than their elders
chunks.chinese: 比他们的长辈略微更乐观

chunks.english: about the prospects for those starting out today
chunks.chinese: 关于今天起步者的前景

chunks.english: those “just getting started in life” face a tougher good-paying job, starting a family, managing debt, and finding affordable housing
chunks.chinese: 那些刚刚开始人生的人面临更困难的高薪工作、组建家庭、管理债务和寻找负担得起住房等问题
那些刚刚开始人生的人

chunks.english: a tougher good-paying job, starting a family, managing debt, and finding affordable housing
chunks.chinese: 更困难的高薪工作、组建家庭、管理债务和寻找负担得起住房
chunks.relation: 作 face 的宾语，原文此处表达略有省略

chunks.english: starting a family / managing debt / finding affordable housing
chunks.chinese: 组建家庭 / 管理债务 / 寻找负担得起的住房
chunks.relation: face 的后续并列困难事项

sentence_patterns.explanation: While 这里表示“尽管”，不是时间。
宾语部分列举多个年轻人面临的现实困难。

original: Pete Schneider considers the climb tougher today.
translation_literal: 皮特·施奈德认为如今这种攀登更艰难。

chunks.relation: 补充说明 the climb 的状态

original: Schneider, a 27-year-old auto technician from the Chicago suburbs says he struggled to find a job after graduating from college.
translation_literal: 施奈德，一个来自芝加哥郊区的 27 岁汽车技师，说他大学毕业后很努力才找到工作。

chunks.english: a 27-year-old auto technician from the Chicago suburbs
chunks.chinese: 一个来自芝加哥郊区的 27 岁汽车技师

chunks.english: he struggled to find a job after graduating from college
chunks.chinese: 他大学毕业后很努力才找到工作

chunks.relation: 作 struggled 的宾语/目的

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 人名 + 身份说明 + 谓语
sentence_patterns.explanation: a 27-year-old... 是 Schneider 的同位语，主句谓语是 says。

original: Even now that he is working steadily, he said, “I can’t afford to pay my monthly mortgage payments on my own, so I have to rent rooms out to people to make that happen.”
translation_literal: 他说：“即使现在我稳定工作，我也负担不起独自支付每月按揭款，所以我不得不把房间出租给别人来做到这一点。”

chunks.english: Even now that he is working steadily
chunks.relation: 说明主句内容成立的让步背景
now that 从句内部主语
now that 从句内部谓语

chunks.english: I can’t afford to pay my monthly mortgage payments on my own
chunks.chinese: 我负担不起独自支付每月按揭款

chunks.english: to pay my monthly mortgage payments on my own
I have to rent rooms out to people to make that happen
chunks.chinese: 我不得不把房间出租给别人来做到这一点
chunks.relation: 第二引语分句，说明结果
作 rent out 的宾语
说明 rent out 的目的

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 状语从句 + he said + 引语
sentence_patterns.explanation: he said 插在让步状语和引语之间，主干在引语内部。
so 连接原因结果，说明为什么要出租房间。

original: Looking back, he is struck that his parents could provide a comfortable life for their children even though neither had completed college when he was young.
translation_literal: 回头看，他感到震惊的是，尽管在他小时候父母两人都没有完成大学学业，他们却能为孩子提供舒适的生活。

chunks.relation: 说明 he is struck 的时间/角度

chunks.english: that his parents could provide a comfortable life for their children even though neither had completed college when he was young
chunks.chinese: 他的父母尽管都没有完成大学学业，却能为孩子提供舒适的生活
chunks.relation: 说明 struck 的原因内容

chunks.english: even though neither had completed college when he was young
chunks.chinese: 尽管在他小时候父母两人都没有完成大学学业
chunks.relation: 说明 could provide 的让步背景
even though 从句内部主语
even though 从句内部谓语

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: even though 引导让步从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: even though 从句说明父母未读完大学，却仍能提供舒适生活。

original: “I still grew up in an upper middle-class home with parents who didn’t have college degrees,” Schneider said.
translation_literal: 施奈德说：“我仍然是在一个上层中产家庭长大的，父母没有大学学位。”

chunks.english: in an upper middle-class home with parents who didn’t have college degrees
chunks.chinese: 在一个父母没有大学学位的上层中产家庭中
chunks.relation: 说明 grew up 的环境
who 定语从句内部主语
who 定语从句内部谓语

sentence_patterns.explanation: Schneider said 位于句末，说明引语来源。

original: “I don’t think people are capable of that anymore.”
translation_literal: “我认为人们现在不再有能力做到那一点了。”

chunks.english: people are capable of that anymore
chunks.chinese: 人们现在还有能力做到那一点
chunks.relation: 作 think 的宾语，否定转移在主句

chunks.chinese: 现在还有能力做到那一点

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 否定转移 I don’t think...
sentence_patterns.explanation: 中文理解时通常把否定转到宾语从句：我认为人们不再有能力。
